top_signals.title: The Strait Of Malacca Faces Growing Fears Of Copycat Shipping Fees
top_signals.summary: Oil prices spiked again on Wednesday after U.S. President Donald Trump declared that the ceasefire deal with Iran is over and vowed to strike Iran again, effectively ending the tentative peace deal barely a month after signing. Iran struck three commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz on Tuesday that were using an alternative route near Oman's coast rather than the northern corridor controlled by Tehran, prompting retaliatory attacks by the United States. Iran has threatened to completely close the Strait of Hormuz again and strike twice as…

top_signals.title: Commission and High Representative propose new sanctions regime to counter threats from migrant smuggling, human trafficking, and other forms of organised crime
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 09 Jul 2026 Today, the European Commission and the High Representative of the Union for Foreign Affairs and Security Policy, proposed a new EU sanctions regime to tackle threats posed by several forms of organised crime, including migrant smuggling, trafficking in human beings, firearms and illicit drugs and money laundering.
